text: Pehle seedha baitho, shoulders loose karo. Phir 4 count inhale aur 6 count exhale, 8 rounds karo. Phir dheere bolo: 'abhi bas agla step'. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: 8 rounds ke baad gola halka laga. Dhadkan bhi thodi stable hui.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe dekar self-blame reduce karna.
text: Layoff ka decision aksar business conditions driven hota hai, personal worth driven nahi. Is reframe se failure wala load dheere kam hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Family ko kaise batana hai, uska tension abhi bhi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: 2 concise scripts देना जो clarity aur control रखें.
text: Do short scripts use karo: (1) 'Role impact hua hai, main plan bana raha hoon.' (2) 'Kal shaam detail share karunga.' Isse panic bhi kam rahega aur message clear rahega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, short line se control rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se dignity-preserving paced action mirror karna.
text: Tum zimmedari nibhate hue apna pace set kar rahe ho, aur wahi sustainable tareeka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko phir darr आता hai ki kal progress na hui toh?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk + Lens E se future fear ko gently hold karna.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari hua. Raat mein uncertainty ka size bada lagta hai, isliye progress ka pressure aur tez mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi, neend toot jati hai aur thakan aur badh jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night fatigue response normalize karna and worth reinforce karna.
text: Aise phase mein broken sleep aur fatigue common response hai, weakness nahi. Tumhara stepwise effort hi recovery ka strongest part hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab kal ka start clear lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ready state par concise 3-block plan lock karna.
text: Kal ka short flow: 5 min breathing, 20 min focused applications, 10 min family update prep. Teen blocks enough hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab gola pehle se kam lag raha hai, body calm hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe about transition timeline.
text: Transition ko time lagna normal hai; daily small consistent steps hi long-term stability create karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab lag raha hai handle kar lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se aaj ki stability ko kal continuity mein anchor karna.
text: Aaj ka stable rhythm kal repeat hua toh panic spikes naturally aur chhote honge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Noted, aaj ke liye enough hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close pe 2 tiny continuation tasks देना without adding burden.
text: Sone se pehle 6 slow breaths aur kal ke 3 blocks notes mein tick-box bana do. Bas itna hi, aaj ka kaam complete.

coping_shade_signal: pure badan mein thakan aur sunn-pan
text: Pure badan mein thakan aur sunn-pan chha gaya hai, termination mail dekhte hi lag raha hai sharir jawab de raha hai. Pet mein jalan seedha gale tak aa rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens A se exact body phrase mirror karke somatic overload ko hold karna.
text: Mail ke baad se badan ka woh gehra thakan-sunn-pan aur pet ki jalan tum par ek saath toot padi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sar mein hathode jaisa dard hai aur saans lena bhi mushkil lag raha hai. Breadwinner hone ka pressure alag se dimaag pe hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
